User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the application, identified by an external authentication system. Contains basic profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, typically provided by an external authentication system (e.g., Google ID).

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

Workspace.title: Workspace
Workspace.description: A top-level container for organizing projects and tasks. Users can belong to multiple workspaces.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Workspace entity.

description.description: A brief description of the workspace.

color.description: A color code or name associated with the workspace for visual identification (e.g., '#RRGGBB').

ownerUserId.description: Reference to the User who owns this workspace. (Relationship: User 1:N Workspace)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workspace was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workspace was last updated.

WorkspaceMember.title: WorkspaceMember
WorkspaceMember.description: Represents the association between a user and a workspace, indicating membership.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkspaceMember entity.

workspaceId.description: Reference to the Workspace this member belongs to. (Relationship: Workspace 1:N WorkspaceMember)

userId.description: Reference to the User who is a member. (Relationship: User 1:N WorkspaceMember)

displayName.description: The display name of the member within this specific workspace context.

email.description: The email address of the member within this specific workspace context.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the member's avatar image, potentially overriding the User's default avatar for this workspace.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A collection of tasks, nested within a specific workspace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

workspaceId.description: Reference to the Workspace this project belongs to. (Relationship: Workspace 1:N Project)

description.description: A detailed description of the project.

color.description: A color code or name associated with the project for visual identification (e.g., '#RRGGBB').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: An individual unit of work, part of a project within a workspace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

workspaceId.description: Reference to the Workspace this task belongs to. (Relationship: Workspace 1:N Task) Required for top-level filtering.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this task belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N Task)

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

priority.description: The priority level of the task.

dueDate.description: The date by which the task is expected to be completed.

assigneeUserId.description: Reference to the User assigned to this task. (Relationship: User 1:N Task)

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the task for categorization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A text-based comment made on a task by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

taskId.description: Reference to the Task this comment belongs to. (Relationship: Task 1:N Comment)

authorUserId.description: Reference to the User who authored this comment. (Relationship: User 1:N Comment)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: An in-app notification for a specific user.

actorId.description: The user who triggered the notification.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the workspace.

definition.description: Contains specific details about a user's membership within a workspace.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent workspace.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who is a member of this workspace.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent workspace.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent workspace.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent project.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the task.

definition.description: Stores comments associated with a task.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent workspace.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent project.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent task.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the comment.
